findings.reason: Algorithm 'RS256' is vulnerable to quantum attack

findings.recommendation: Upgrade to TLS 1.3 with hybrid PQC key exchange
Migrate to ML-KEM hybrid key exchange (X25519+ML-KEM-768)
Plan certificate migration to ML-DSA signed certs
Migrate to ML-DSA (FIPS 204)
Migrate to ML-DSA (FIPS 204)
Migrate keys to HSM or Cloud KMS with access controls
Implement automatic key rotation (90-day cycle recommended)
Migrate to PQC-safe key algorithms (ML-KEM/ML-DSA)

findings.issue: RSA key size vulnerable to quantum attack
findings.details: RSA-2048 vulnerable to Shor's algorithm
findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-DSA (FIPS 204) or increase to RSA-4096 as interim

findings.issue: Certificate expires after quantum threat timeline
findings.details: Certificate valid until 2031-12-31T23:59:59Z, past Q-Day (2030)
findings.recommendation: Renew with PQC algorithms before 2030

findings.details: AES-128 offers ~64-bit security against quantum attacks
findings.recommendation: Upgrade to AES-256 for 128-bit quantum security

findings.issue: No field-level encryption for sensitive data
findings.details: Sensitive fields not individually encrypted
findings.recommendation: Implement field-level encryption for PII/PHI

findings.details: PBKDF2 with 50000 iterations insufficient
findings.recommendation: Use PBKDF2 with 600,000+ iterations or migrate to Argon2

findings.details: Cookies vulnerable to CSRF attacks
findings.recommendation: Enable SameSite=Strict on session cookies

findings.details: AES-128 offers ~64-bit security against quantum attacks
findings.recommendation: Upgrade to AES-256 for 128-bit quantum security

findings.details: Keys stored in files without proper protection
findings.recommendation: Migrate to HSM or cloud KMS

findings.details: Organization lacks formal PQC transition strategy
findings.recommendation: Develop comprehensive PQC migration roadmap

findings.details: Quantum threat impact not formally assessed
findings.recommendation: Conduct quantum cryptanalysis risk assessment

findings.details: Cryptographic modules not FIPS validated
findings.recommendation: Use FIPS 140-2 Level 3+ validated crypto modules

findings.details: No audit trail for key usage and crypto operations
findings.recommendation: Enable comprehensive crypto audit logging

migration_recommendations: CRITICAL: Migrate JWT signing to ML-DSA (FIPS 204) per NIST standards. Deadline: 2035 (full transition)
MEDIUM: Improve oauth_oidc (OAuth at https://api.demo-company.com/.well-known/openid-configuration). Score indicates partial quantum exposure in US context.
CRITICAL: Replace quantum-vulnerable certificates with PQC algorithms. Current certificates expire past quantum threat timeline.
MEDIUM: Improve api_encryption (AES-128-GCM encryption). Score indicates partial quantum exposure in US context.
MEDIUM: Improve data_at_rest (AES-128-CBC storage). Score indicates partial quantum exposure in US context.
MEDIUM: Improve regulatory_compliance (US compliance). Score indicates partial quantum exposure in US context.
